heading: Causeway Lake vs Cawdor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Causeway Lake, Queensland and Cawdor, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Causeway Lake and Cawdor have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Causeway Lake or Cawdor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Causeway Lake has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Cawdor scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Causeway Lake scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Cawdor scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Causeway Lake or Cawdor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Causeway Lake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
